retention_period_in_days.description: The number of days Audit Log events will be retained before being permanently deleted.

state.description: The current state of the audit log configuration for the organization.

id.description: Unique identifier of the Audit Log Stream.

type.description: The type of the Audit Log Stream destination.

state.description: The current state of the Audit Log Stream.

last_synced_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the last event was successfully synced, or null if no events have been synced.

log_stream.description: The Audit Log Stream currently configured for the organization, if any.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
